title: Network Segmentation Plan
scenario: Create a network segmentation plan for an organization with a complex network topology. The plan should include a network segmentation strategy, segmentation rules, and a migration plan. The document should be written in a formal tone and be no more than 4 pages in length. Assume the organization has a mix of cloud and on-premises infrastructure.
constraints: Use a standard network segmentation framework

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the plan adhere to a standard network segmentation framework?
Are at least 5 segmentation rules included?
Is the document written in a formal tone?
